# Agents Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-04

## Active Technologies
- PostgreSQL 16+ (primary), Redis 7+ (cache, sessioni, job queue) (001-it-asset-management)

- TypeScript 5.x su Node.js 20 LTS (backend, web, mobile condividono il linguaggio) (001-it-asset-management)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x su Node.js 20 LTS (backend, web, mobile condividono il linguaggio): Follow standard conventions
